# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud monitoring and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
# Cloud SQL Instance with monitoring-friendly configuration
- name: app-sql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-2
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        binaryLogEnabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: false
        privateNetwork: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
        requireSsl: true
      databaseFlags:
        - name: slow_query_log
          value: "on"
        - name: log_output
          value: TABLE
        - name: long_query_time
          value: "1"
        - name: general_log
          value: "on"
      maintenanceWindow:
        day: 7
        hour: 2
        updateTrack: stable
      storageAutoResize: true
      storageAutoResizeLimit: 100
      dataDiskSizeGb: 50
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      availabilityType: REGIONAL

- name: app-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.app-sql-instance.name)
    name: appdb
    charset: utf8mb4

# VPC Network
- name: app-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: app-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC

# Firewall Rules - Restrictive
- name: allow-health-check
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "80"
          - "443"
    sourceRanges:
      - "130.211.0.0/22"
      - "35.191.0.0/16"
    targetTags:
      - app-server
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000

- name: allow-iap-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "22"
    sourceRanges:
      - "35.235.240.0/20"
    targetTags:
      - app-server
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000

- name: deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: ALL
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 65534

# Service Account for Compute Instances
- name: app-service-account
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: app-vm-sa
    displayName: Application VM Service Account
    projectId: {{ env["project"] }}

# IAM binding for the service account - least privilege
- name: app-sa-log-writer-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: {{ env["project"] }}
    role: roles/logging.logWriter
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)

- name: app-sa-metric-writer-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: {{ env["project"] }}
    role: roles/monitoring.metricWriter
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)

- name: app-sa-storage-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: {{ env["project"] }}
    role: roles/storage.objectViewer
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)

# Instance Template
- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: e2-medium
      tags:
        items:
          - app-server
      serviceAccounts:
        - email: $(ref.app-service-account.email)
          scopes:
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/logging.write
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/monitoring.write
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/devstorage.read_only
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          type: PERSISTENT
          boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: projects/cos-cloud/global/images/family/cos-stable
            diskSizeGb: 20
            diskType: pd-ssd
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
          subnetwork: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
      shieldedInstanceConfig:
        enableSecureBoot: true
        enableVtpm: true
        enableIntegrityMonitoring: true
      metadata:
        items:
          - key: enable-oslogin
            value: "TRUE"
          - key: startup-script
            value: |
              #!/bin/bash
              set -euo pipefail

              # Install and configure Ops Agent for logging and monitoring
              curl -sSO https://dl.google.com/cloudagents/add-google-cloud-ops-agent-repo.sh
              bash add-google-cloud-ops-agent-repo.sh --also-install

              # Configure Ops Agent for application logs and metrics
              cat > /etc/google-cloud-ops-agent/config.yaml << 'EOF'
              logging:
                receivers:
                  app_logs:
                    type: files
                    include_paths:
                      - /var/log/app/*.log
                    record_log_name: app-application-log
                  syslog:
                    type: files
                    include_paths:
                      - /var/log/syslog
                      - /var/log/messages
                  auth_logs:
                    type: files
                    include_paths:
                      - /var/log/auth.log
                      - /var/log/secure
                service:
                  pipelines:
                    default_pipeline:
                      receivers:
                        - app_logs
                        - syslog
                        - auth_logs
              metrics:
                receivers:
                  hostmetrics:
                    type: hostmetrics
                    collection_interval: 30s
                  nginx:
                    type: nginx
                    stub_status_url: http://127.0.0.1:8080/status
                service:
                  pipelines:
                    default_pipeline:
                      receivers:
                        - hostmetrics
                        - nginx
              EOF

              systemctl restart google-cloud-ops-agent

              mkdir -p /var/log/app

# Managed Instance Group
- name: app-instance-group
  type: compute.v1.regionInstanceGroupManager
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    baseInstanceName: app-vm
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
    targetSize: 2
    namedPorts:
      - name: http
        port: 80
      - name: https
        port: 443
    autoHealingPolicies:
      - healthCheck: $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
        initialDelaySec: 300
    updatePolicy:
      type: PROACTIVE
      minimalAction: REPLACE
      maxSurge:
        fixed: 1
      maxUnavailable:
        fixed: 0
      minReadySec: 60

# Autoscaler
- name: app-autoscaler
  type: compute.v1.regionAutoscaler
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    target: $(ref.app-instance-group.selfLink)
    autoscalingPolicy:
      minNumReplicas: 2
      maxNumReplicas: 6
      cpuUtilization:
        utilizationTarget: 0.7
      coolDownPeriodSec: 120

# Health Check
- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.healthCheck
  properties:
    type: HTTP
    httpHealthCheck:
      port: 80
      requestPath: /healthz
    checkIntervalSec: 10
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 3

# Cloud Storage Bucket
- name: app-storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ env["project"] }}-app-assets
    location: US-CENTRAL1
    storageClass: STANDARD
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    logging:
      logBucket: {{ env["project"] }}-app-access-logs
      logObjectPrefix: storage-access
    lifecycle:
      rule:
        - action:
            type: Delete
          condition:
            age: 365
            isLive: false
        - action:
            type: SetStorageClass
            storageClass: NEARLINE
          condition:
            age: 90
            isLive: true
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""

# Access logs bucket for storage audit
- name: app-access-logs-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ env["project"] }}-app-access-logs
    location: US-CENTRAL1
    storageClass: STANDARD
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    lifecycle:
      rule:
        - action:
            type: Delete
          condition:
            age: 730
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
    retentionPolicy:
      retentionPeriod: 31536000

# Backend Service
- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    backends:
      - group: $(ref.app-instance-group.instanceGroup)
        balancingMode: UTILIZATION
        maxUtilization: 0.8
        capacityScaler: 1.0
    healthChecks:
      - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    connectionDraining:
      drainingTimeoutSec: 300
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      sampleRate: 1.0
    securityPolicy: $(ref.app-security-policy.selfLink)

# Cloud Armor Security Policy
- name: app-security-policy
  type: compute.v1.securityPolicy
  properties:
    description: Security policy for application load balancer
    rules:
      - action: deny(403)
        description: Block known bad IPs
        match:
          versionedExpr: SRC_IPS_V1
          config:
            srcIpRanges:
              - "0.0.0.0/32"
        priority: 1000
      - action: allow
        description: Default allow rule
        match:
          versionedExpr: SRC_IPS_V1
          config:
            srcIpRanges:
              - "*"
        priority: 2147483647
    adaptiveProtectionConfig:
      layer7DdosDefenseConfig:
        enable: true

# URL Map
- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

# SSL Certificate (managed)
- name: app-ssl-cert
  type: compute.v1.managedSslCertificate
  properties:
    managed:
      domains:
        - app.example.com
    type: MANAGED

# HTTPS Target Proxy
- name: app-https-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpsProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)
    sslCertificates:
      - $(ref.app-ssl-cert.selfLink)
    sslPolicy: $(ref.app-ssl-policy.selfLink)

# SSL Policy - enforce modern TLS
- name: app-ssl-policy
  type: compute.v1.sslPolicy
  properties:
    profile: RESTRICTED
    minTlsVersion: TLS_1_2

# HTTP Target Proxy (redirect to HTTPS)
- name: app-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-http-redirect-url-map.selfLink)

# URL Map for HTTP to HTTPS redirect
- name: app-http-redirect-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultUrlRedirect:
      httpsRedirect: true
      redirectResponseCode: MOVED_PERMANENTLY_DEFAULT
      stripQuery: false

# Global Static IP
- name: app-global-ip
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    ipVersion: IPV4

# HTTPS Forwarding Rule
- name: app-https-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    target: $(ref.app-https-proxy.selfLink)
    IPAddress: $(ref.app-global-ip.selfLink)
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: "443"
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

# HTTP Forwarding Rule (redirect)
- name: app-http-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
    IPAddress: $(ref.app-global-ip.selfLink)
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: "80"
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

# Log Sink for audit logs to dedicated bucket
- name: app-audit-log-sink
  type: gcp-types/logging-v2:projects.sinks
  properties:
    sink: app-audit-sink
    destination: storage.googleapis.com/{{ env["project"] }}-app-access-logs
    filter: >
      resource.type="gce_instance" OR
      resource.type="cloud_sql_database" OR
      resource.type="gcs_bucket" OR
      resource.type="http_load_balancer"
    uniqueWriterIdentity: true

# Monitoring Notification Channel (email)
- name: app-notification-channel
  type: gcp-types/monitoring-v3:projects.notificationChannels
  properties:
    type: email
    displayName: App Ops Team Email
    labels:
      email_address: ops-team@example.com
    enabled: true

# Uptime Check for application endpoint
- name: app-uptime-check
  type: gcp-types/monitoring-v3:projects.uptimeCheckConfigs
  properties:
    displayName: App HTTPS Uptime Check
    monitoredResource:
      type: uptime_url
      labels:
        project_id: {{ env["project"] }}
        host: app.example.com
    httpCheck:
      path: /healthz
      port: 443
      useSsl: true
      validateSsl: true
      requestMethod: GET
    period: 60s
    timeout: 10s

# Alert Policy - High CPU
- name: app-cpu-alert-policy
  type: gcp-types/monitoring-v3:projects.alertPolicies
  properties:
    displayName: High CPU Utilization Alert
    combiner: OR
    conditions:
      - displayName: CPU utilization above 85%
        conditionThreshold:
          filter: >
            resource.type = "gce_instance" AND
            metric.type = "compute.googleapis.com/instance/cpu/utilization"
          comparison: COMPARISON_GT
          thresholdValue: 0.85
          duration: 300s
          aggregations:
            - alignmentPeriod: 120s
              perSeriesAligner: ALIGN_MEAN
              crossSeriesReducer: REDUCE_MEAN
              groupByFields:
                - resource.label.instance_id
    notificationChannels:
      - $(ref.app-notification-channel.name)
    alertStrategy:
      autoClose: 1800s
    enabled: true

# Alert Policy - Cloud SQL High Connections
- name: app-sql-connections-alert
  type: gcp-types/monitoring-v3:projects.alertPolicies
  properties:
    displayName: Cloud SQL High Connection Count
    combiner: OR
    conditions:
      - displayName: SQL connections above threshold
        conditionThreshold:
          filter: >
            resource.type = "cloudsql_database" AND
            metric.type = "cloudsql.googleapis.com/database/network/connections"
          comparison: COMPARISON_GT
          thresholdValue: 200
          duration: 300s
          aggregations:
            - alignmentPeriod: 120s
              perSeriesAligner: ALIGN_MEAN
    notificationChannels:
      - $(ref.app-notification-channel.name)
    enabled: true

# Alert Policy - LB 5xx Error Rate
- name: app-lb-error-alert
  type: gcp-types/monitoring-v3:projects.alertPolicies
  properties:
    displayName: Load Balancer 5xx Error Rate Alert
    combiner: OR
    conditions:
      - displayName: 5xx error rate above 5%
        conditionThreshold:
          filter: >
            resource.type = "http_load_balancer" AND
            metric.type = "loadbalancing.googleapis.com/https/request_count" AND
            metric.labels.response_code_class = "500"
          comparison: COMPARISON_GT
          thresholdValue: 5
          duration: 120s
          aggregations:
            - alignmentPeriod: 60s
              perSeriesAligner: ALIGN_RATE
    notificationChannels:
      - $(ref.app-notification-channel.name)
    enabled: true

# Alert Policy - Uptime Check Failure
- name: app-uptime-alert
  type: gcp-types/monitoring-v3:projects.alertPolicies
  properties:
    displayName: Application Uptime Check Failure
    combiner: OR
    conditions:
      - displayName: Uptime check failing
        conditionThreshold:
          filter: >
            resource.type = "uptime_url" AND
            metric.type = "monitoring.googleapis.com/uptime_check/check_passed"
          comparison: COMPARISON_LT
          thresholdValue: 1
          duration: 300s
          aggregations:
            - alignmentPeriod: 300s
              perSeriesAligner: ALIGN_FRACTION_TRUE
              crossSeriesReducer: REDUCE_COUNT_FALSE
    notificationChannels:
      - $(ref.app-notification-channel.name)
    enabled: true

# Monitoring Dashboard
- name: app-monitoring-dashboard
  type: gcp-types/monitoring-v1:projects.dashboards
  properties:
    displayName: Application Stack Overview
    gridLayout:
      columns: 2
      widgets:
        - title: VM CPU Utilization
          xyChart:
            dataSets:
              - timeSeriesQuery:
                  timeSeriesFilter:
                    filter: >
                      resource.type = "gce_instance" AND
                      metric.type = "compute.googleapis.com/instance/cpu/utilization"
                    aggregation:
                      alignmentPeriod: 120s
                      perSeriesAligner: ALIGN_MEAN
                plotType: LINE
            timeshiftDuration: 0s
            yAxis:
              scale: LINEAR
        - title: Load Balancer Request Count
          xyChart:
            dataSets:
              - timeSeriesQuery:
                  timeSeriesFilter:
                    filter: >
                      resource.type = "http_load_balancer" AND
                      metric.type = "loadbalancing.googleapis.com/https/request_count"
                    aggregation:
                      alignmentPeriod: 60s
                      perSeriesAligner: ALIGN_RATE
                plotType: LINE
            timeshiftDuration: 0s
            yAxis:
              scale: LINEAR
        - title: Cloud SQL CPU Utilization
          xyChart:
            dataSets:
              - timeSeriesQuery:
                  timeSeriesFilter:
                    filter: >
                      resource.type = "cloudsql_database" AND
                      metric.type = "cloudsql.googleapis.com/database/cpu/utilization"
                    aggregation:
                      alignmentPeriod: 120s
                      perSeriesAligner: ALIGN_MEAN
                plotType: LINE
            timeshiftDuration: 0s
            yAxis:
              scale: LINEAR
        - title: Cloud SQL Connections
          xyChart:
            dataSets:
              - timeSeriesQuery:
                  timeSeriesFilter:
                    filter: >
                      resource.type = "cloudsql_database" AND
                      metric.type = "cloudsql.googleapis.com/database/network/connections"
                    aggregation:
                      alignmentPeriod: 120s
                      perSeriesAligner: ALIGN_MEAN
                plotType: LINE
            timeshiftDuration: 0s
            yAxis:
              scale: LINEAR

outputs:
  - name: globalIp
    value: $(ref.app-global-ip.address)
  - name: sqlInstanceConnectionName
    value: $(ref.app-sql-instance.connectionName)
  - name: storageBucket
    value: $(ref.app-storage-bucket.name)
  - name: serviceAccountEmail
    value: $(ref.app-service-account.email)
